feat.name: Ferry Through Waves
feat.text: The waters around you permit you passage, a privilege you can share with a willing ally. You hold on to an adjacent ally and Swim, carrying them along with you. If you spend three actions Ferrying through Waves, you instead Swim twice. If your ally would need to attempt any Athletics checks to Swim while you’re Ferrying through Waves, you roll the check and your result applies to them.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.

feat.requirement: You are swimming and have a free hand.
